message:
refactor(storage): enhance storage pipeline error handling and fallback mechanism

This commit improves the error handling in the storage pipeline when attempting to open a database. A new helper function, `try_open`, is introduced to encapsulate the logic for opening the storage pipeline with specified thresholds. If an error occurs due to a locking issue, a fallback path is generated, allowing the application to continue functioning without crashing. This change enhances the robustness of the storage system and provides clearer feedback to the user when encountering locking issues.

Additionally, the `StorageError` type is now imported to handle specific storage-related errors more effectively, ensuring that the application can gracefully manage storage access conflicts.

The changes maintain the existing functionality while improving the overall user experience during storage operations.
